commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f46a92bc731399ab018e81ed361f84e5da0ed219)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes top-level and structured `image` values participate in outbound media normalization and send-payload construction.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main normalizes the `image` key but omits it from final outbound media selection, giving a high-confidence source path for successful text delivery with the requested attachment discarded.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor should revise the parameter-contract direction and supply real behavior proof; ClawSweeper automation cannot provide proof from the contributor’s environment.

target.title: fix(message-tool): recognize `image` param as media source on send
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #92407 — When a model passes an `image` param to the message tool send action (e.g. `{"action":"send","message":"1/7","image":"/path/to/photo.jpg"}`), the param was silently ignored: text was delivered but the attachment was lost with `ok: true`. The model had no signal anything went wrong.

**Root cause:** the media-hint chain in `buildSendPayloadParts` checked `media`, `mediaUrl`, `path`, `filePath`, `fileUrl` but not `image`. The same gap existed in `collectMessageAttachmentMediaHints` (for structured attachments) and `STRUCTURED_ATTACHMENT_MEDIA_SOURCE_PARAM_KEYS`.

## Changes

- `src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.ts`: Added `image` to the `mediaHint` chain in `buildSendPayloadParts` and to `collectMessageAttachmentMediaHints`
- `src/infra/outbound/message-action-params.ts`: Added `image` to `STRUCTURED_ATTACHMENT_MEDIA_SOURCE_PARAM_KEYS`

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: `image` param on message send silently dropped — text delivered, attachment lost, `ok: true` returned
- **Real environment tested**: Node.js 22, Linux, real filesystem in `/tmp`
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  - `pnpm test src/infra/outbound/message-action-params.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.media.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts --run`
  - `./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/proof-92407-image-param.mts`
- **Evidence after fix**:

```text
=== PR #92407 live-proof: message tool `image` param silently dropped ===

--- Test A: Top-level `image` param as media source hint ---
  Input args: { image: "/tmp/.../test-image.jpg", message: "check this out" }
  Collected hints (string[]): ["/tmp/.../test-image.jpg"]
  PASS: image param collected as media source hint — found "/tmp/.../test-image.jpg"

--- Test B: `image` param equivalence with `media` param ---
  Hints with "image" param (string[]): ["/tmp/.../test-image.jpg"]
  Hints with "media" param (string[]): ["/tmp/.../test-image.jpg"]
  PASS: `image` param produces media hints — 1 hint(s)
  PASS: `media` param produces media hints — 1 hint(s)

--- Test C: `image` field inside structured attachments ---
  Structured attachment hints (string[]): ["/tmp/.../test-image.jpg"]
  PASS: image in structured attachment collected — 1 hint(s) found

--- Test D: Source-level verification of fix locations ---
  PASS: Fix 1: image in STRUCTURED_ATTACHMENT_MEDIA_SOURCE_PARAM_KEYS
  PASS: Fix 2: image in mediaHint chain (buildSendPayloadParts)
  PASS: Fix 3: image in collectMessageAttachmentMediaHints

--- Test E: Existing test suite regression ---
  Result: 88 tests passed, 0 failed
  PASS: Existing tests pass with fix applied — 88/88

=== ALL PASSED ===
```

- **Observed result after fix**: The `image` param value is now correctly collected as a media source hint at all three layers: top-level param scanning, structured attachment iteration, and the buildSendPayloadParts media hint chain. Models that naturally use `image` as the param name for photos will now have their attachments delivered.
- **What was not tested**: End-to-end delivery through a live Telegram channel (requires live bot token); the fix is scoped to the media source param collection layer which is channel-agnostic.

## Verification

- `pnpm test` — 88 tests passed (message-action-params, message-action-runner.media, message-action-runner.send-validation)
- `./node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/proof-92407-image-param.mts` — all 8 assertions passed
- 2 files changed, +4 −1 lines

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
